topic: Viewing an Employee's Assigned Salary Template (Contract)
summary: This topic explains how to view the specific salary template or contract that is currently assigned to an employee.
steps: Click on the employee's record to 'View' their details.
Scroll down to the 'Salary Template' section.
Click on 'Salary Template' to display the details of the currently assigned contract.
important_notes: This view shows the details of the *assigned salary template* (contract), not the processed monthly salary for any particular month.
While it's possible to add new templates from this view, using the 'Assign Salary Template' module is generally preferred as it provides calculation previews.
questions: How can I check the current salary contract assigned to an employee?
Where do I find the details of an employee's salary template?
Does viewing the salary template show the actual monthly salary?
